fields.label: Is Primary
fields.description: Mark as primary locale for this channel

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this locale for the channel

fields.label: Content Required
fields.description: If checked, products must have content in this locale to be channel-ready

fields.label: Fallback Locale
fields.description: Locale to use when content is not available in this locale (channel-specific override)

fields.label: Min Completeness
fields.description: Minimum completeness percentage required for this locale (0 = use channel default)

fields.label: Export Priority
fields.description: Priority order for locale in exports (lower = first)

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Notes about this locale configuration for the channel
